## Summary

Describe what this PR changes and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] `dart format --set-exit-if-changed .`
- [ ] `flutter analyze`
- [ ] `flutter test --timeout 60s`
- [ ] `make test-integration` (if changes affect integration flows)
- [ ] Docs updated (if behavior or setup changed)
- [ ] CI is green (secrets scan + Flutter checks + release appbundle build)
